content:
FINAL BUSINESS WORKFLOW BUILD — IVX END TO END

Developer runtime and Variables module are now verified. Next, complete the real IVX business workflows.

EXECUTE NOW:

1. MEMBER ACCOUNT CONTROL
- Forgot password
- Email recovery
- SMS recovery
- Login
- Profile update
- Account lock/unlock
- No permanent delete if user has financial history

2. INVESTOR CONTROL
- Investor profile
- KYC status
- Accredited investor status
- Investment history
- Active investments
- Profit history
- Documents

3. JV DEALS / PRIVATE LENDERS / TOKENIZED
- Create deal
- Join deal
- Track ownership
- Track invested amount
- Track profit percentage
- Track documents
- Track status

4. MONEY / WALLET / LEDGER
- Investor balance
- Deposits
- Withdrawals
- Profit distributions
- Fees
- Transaction history
- Immutable ledger
- Owner approval for corrections

5. WITHDRAWAL / WIRE CONTROL
- Withdrawal request
- Owner review
- Approve/reject
- Wire pending
- Wire sent
- Wire completed
- Full audit trail

6. OWNER ADMIN SAFETY
- Restore account
- Freeze account
- Suspend account
- Archive account
- Never delete account with money
- Every admin action logged

7. LANDING + SIGNUP
- No jumping main screen
- Real counts only
- Signup works
- Members show real DB data only
- Android and iOS match

8. PRODUCTION QA
Verify on:
- Desktop
- Android
- iOS

RETURN ONLY:

STATE:
FILES_CHANGED:
MEMBER_ACCOUNT_STATUS:
INVESTOR_STATUS:
JV_DEALS_STATUS:
PRIVATE_LENDER_STATUS:
TOKENIZED_STATUS:
WALLET_STATUS:
LEDGER_STATUS:
WITHDRAWAL_STATUS:
WIRE_STATUS:
OWNER_ADMIN_STATUS:
LANDING_STATUS:
SIGNUP_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
Do not mark VERIFIED unless every workflow is live, tested, and protected by audit logs.
No fake money.
No fake investors.
No fake members.
No irreversible deletes.
